PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-01-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUCLU, HUSEVIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE HUSING. PLAINTIFF JEREMY DOWNING IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS JEANETTE AUTHOR. DEFENDANT HUSEVIN GUCLU IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES KAREN GOLDSTEIN AND LEONARD SZETO OF GEICO INSURANCE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOWNING, JEREMY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUCLU, HUSEVIN EXHIBITS ARE HELD UP TO 120 DAYS AND IF NOT COLLECTED ARE DESTROYED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
